answer: Under the Service Agreement, neither party shall be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages (service_agreement.html, p.1). The maximum liability is capped at fees paid in the preceding 12 months (service_agreement.html, p.1).
evidence: LIMITATION OF LIABILITY: In no event shall either party be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Maximum liability is capped at fees paid in the preceding 12 months.
